prompt: Generate a 3-day full body workout plan for a beginner focusing on muscle gain with no injuries.
completion: {"plan_name": "Beginner Full Body", "duration_weeks": 4, "days": [{"day": 1, "focus": "Full Body A", "exercises": [{"name": "Goblet Squat", "sets": 3, "reps": 12, "rest_seconds": 90, "notes": "Focus on depth and form"}, {"name": "Dumbbell Bench Press", "sets": 3, "reps": 10, "rest_seconds": 90, "notes": "Control the weight"}, {"name": "Seated Cable Row", "sets": 3, "reps": 12, "rest_seconds": 60, "notes": "Squeeze shoulder blades"}, {"name": "Overhead Press", "sets": 3, "reps": 10, "rest_seconds": 60, "notes": "Keep core tight"}]}, {"day": 2, "focus": "Rest", "exercises": []}, {"day": 3, "focus": "Full Body B", "exercises": [{"name": "Romanian Deadlift", "sets": 3, "reps": 10, "rest_seconds": 90, "notes": "Hinge at hips"}, {"name": "Incline Dumbbell Press", "sets": 3, "reps": 10, "rest_seconds": 90, "notes": "30 degree angle"}, {"name": "Lat Pulldown", "sets": 3, "reps": 12, "rest_seconds": 60, "notes": "Wide grip"}, {"name": "Lateral Raise", "sets": 3, "reps": 15, "rest_seconds": 45, "notes": "Light weight"}]}, {"day": 4, "focus": "Rest", "exercises": []}, {"day": 5, "focus": "Full Body C", "exercises": [{"name": "Leg Press", "sets": 3, "reps": 12, "rest_seconds": 90, "notes": "Full range of motion"}, {"name": "Push-ups", "sets": 3, "reps": 12, "rest_seconds": 60, "notes": "Chest to floor"}, {"name": "Dumbbell Row", "sets": 3, "reps": 10, "rest_seconds": 60, "notes": "Each arm"}, {"name": "Face Pulls", "sets": 3, "reps": 15, "rest_seconds": 45, "notes": "External rotation"}]}]}
